round_1_systems.name: PNL_ANALYTICS
round_1_systems.impact: Foundation for all optimization — enables measurement

round_1_systems.name: PARTIAL_TAKE_PROFIT
round_1_systems.impact: +15-25% net SOL extraction from ladder profit-taking

round_1_systems.name: doPartialSell
round_1_systems.impact: Sells fraction of position via PumpDev trade-local with token amounts

round_1_systems.name: SELL_TIP_ESCALATION
round_1_systems.impact: +5-10% sell TX landing rate via account-aware VeryHigh priority fees

round_1_systems.name: CONFIDENCE_CALIBRATOR
round_1_systems.impact: 2-3x capital efficiency on high-confidence trades via calibrated Kelly

round_1_systems.name: SLOT_TRACKER
round_1_systems.impact: Enables slot-based copy delay analysis and gating

round_2_systems.name: ENTRY_SLOT_GATE
round_2_systems.description: Blocks live trades when the PumpPortal message is >4 slots behind current slot. Alpha is already priced in by then. Paper trades bypass gate.
round_2_systems.impact: Eliminates 20-40% of losing trades from stale copies

round_2_systems.name: WALLET_ALPHA_DECAY
round_2_systems.description: Runs every 5 minutes. Auto-demotes wallets with <35% WR and negative PnL over 10+ trades to X tier. Auto-promotes X/C wallets with >55% WR and positive PnL over 15+ trades to B tier.
round_2_systems.impact: Continuously purges underperforming wallets, recovers good ones

round_2_systems.name: REGIME_ADAPTIVE
round_2_systems.description: Dynamically adjusts CFG.takeProfit, CFG.trailDrop, CFG.maxpos based on HMM regime. EUPHORIA: lower TP (grab profits fast), tighter trail, +2 maxpos. FEAR: higher TP (let survivors run), wider trail, -2 maxpos. ROTATION: restore defaults.
round_2_systems.impact: Adapts strategy to market conditions without manual intervention

round_2_systems.name: SELL_RETRY_HARDENING
round_2_systems.description: When all 3 sell paths fail (trade-local + Lightning + Jupiter), auto-retries up to 5 times with exponential backoff (5s, 10s, 15s, 20s, 25s). Position is restored and re-queued. After 5 failures, falls through to orphan scanner.
round_2_systems.impact: Eliminates stuck positions from sell failures
